# PERF-004 negative: map allocated with capacity hint outside loop
lang: go
file: PERF-004-safe.go
---
package sample

func GroupByKey(items []string) []map[string]int {
	out := make([]map[string]int, 0, len(items))
	for _, item := range items {
		counts := make(map[string]int, 1)
		counts[item] = 1
		out = append(out, counts)
	}
	return out
}
